global.title: Solar is crushing gas growth worldwide, a new report finds
global.summary: Natural gas is losing its grip on the global power mix as countries increasingly turn to cheaper, more secure renewable energy, according to a new report from climate and energy think tank Ember. global.title: BYD’s 1,000+ hp drop-top luxury EV spotted undisguised [Images]
global.summary: BYD is already calling it the world’s first intelligent electric supercar. Packing over 1,000 hp, the Denza Z can sprint from 0-62 mph (0-100 km/h) in under 2 seconds, and it’s about to go head-to-head with Porsche, Ferrari, and other luxury brands in Europe. more…

global.title: Ford’s $30,000 EV pickup is getting closer — You may even see one out in the wild
global.summary: The midsize electric pickup can’t come soon enough. According to Ford, you might see a disguised one on the streets very soon. more…

global.title: Donut Lab’s ‘solid-state’ battery exposed as regular li-ion in damning investigation
global.summary: A comprehensive investigation by battery researcher Ziroth, involving over 20 independent battery experts, has produced what amounts to definitive proof that Donut Lab’s “miracle” solid-state battery is actually a lithium-ion cell. global.title: EcoFlow Early Prime Day power station deals up 62% off + bonus savings and FREE gifts/rewards from $149, more
global.summary: If you weren’t aware, at the end of June will be the biannual Prime Day Sale event, and leading today’s Green Deals is the freshly launched EcoFlow Early Prime Day Sale with up to 62% discounts on a large array of power stations and accessories that is giving us some of the best prices yet in 2026 –

global.title: This $9,000 EV is about to take Mexico by storm: Meet Olinia
global.summary: Mexico’s President, Claudia Sheinbaum, unveiled Olinia, the nation’s first homegrown electric vehicle. The new EV is set to go on sale in 2027, starting at under $9,000. more…

global.title: Watch a BYD electric sedan do a full tank turn in a hilariously tight space
global.summary: A viral video racking up hundreds of thousands of views shows a BYD electric sedan performing a tank turn in an impossibly narrow space between barriers. global.title: Solid-state EV battery maker debuts on Nasdaq after 745+ mile range real-world test
global.summary: Its solid-state batteries have already proven capable of delivering over 745 miles (1,200 km) of real-world driving range. Now, US-based solid-state battery maker Factorial Energy is tapping into public markets to fund its next phase of growth. more…

global.title: BYD is about to launch another flagship luxury EV: Here’s our first look [Images]
global.summary: BYD released the first images of the Da Han, a new flagship luxury electric sedan equipped with its ultra-fast Flash Charging. more…

global.title: China’s EV shift cut pollution enough to prevent 262,000 deaths
global.summary: China’s rapid switch to electric and other new energy vehicles cut urban air pollution enough to prevent an estimated 262,000 premature deaths, according to a new peer-reviewed study published in Nature Health.
